slot.chooseAction: What would you like to do?
slot.blockDescription: Mark this time slot as unavailable
slot.scheduleDescription: Create a manual appointment for a client
slot.outsideNote: Outside business hours — special appointments only

import.title: Let's import your clients
import.subtitle: Choose how you want to import your contact list.
import.dropzone: Drag CSV here or click to browse

service.heading: Which treatment would you like?
service.empty: No services are available right now

auth.subtitleOptions: Sign in or create an account to continue
auth.subtitleRegister: Create your account to manage your appointments

confirm.heading: Confirm your booking
confirm.policyFallback: By booking you accept the cancellation policy.
confirm.emailHelp: You will receive the confirmation at this email.
confirm.acceptTerms: I accept the terms and conditions
confirm.termsRequiredError: You must accept the terms to continue.
confirm.conflictError: This time slot was just booked. Please choose another.

notices.cancelledPayment: Your payment was cancelled. You can pick another time or try again.
notices.oauthError: Google sign-in failed. Please try again or continue as a guest.

stripe.title: Stripe
stripe.platformFeeNote: Payments are transferred directly to your bank account. SkinSystem charges a 10% platform fee.

disconnected.heading: Connect your bank account
disconnected.body: Connect your bank account through Stripe to receive payments from your clients directly. The setup takes less than 5 minutes.

bullets.methods: Card payments, Apple Pay and Google Pay
bullets.transfers: Automatic transfers to your bank account

pending.heading: Verification pending
pending.body: Your Stripe account was created but verification isn't finished yet. Pick up where you left off to activate charges.
pending.warning: Complete onboarding to start accepting client payments.

connected.heading: Payments live
connected.body: Your Stripe account is verified and payouts go straight to your bank.

newTabBanner.title: Stripe opened in another tab
newTabBanner.description: Finish the process there and return here. We'll refresh automatically.

disconnectDialog.title: Disconnect Stripe?
disconnectDialog.description: Your Stripe account stays untouched at dashboard.stripe.com with all your payout history. We'll just stop routing new charges here: your booking page will stop accepting online payments until you reconnect.
disconnectDialog.errorForbidden: Only the owner can disconnect Stripe.
disconnectDialog.errorGeneric: We couldn't disconnect. Please try again.

errors.popupBlocked: Your browser blocked the popup. We'll redirect in this tab instead.
errors.linkExpired: The Stripe link expired. Generate a new one.
errors.generic: Couldn't connect to Stripe. Please try again.

callback.successBody: You can close this tab. Your SkinSystem dashboard is already up to date.
callback.refreshBody: Head back to SkinSystem and generate a new link to continue.
